1010001011010100 1011011101010101 0 -> sum: 0101101000101001, cout: 1
0000011000110010 1010011000111000 1 -> sum: 1010110001101011, cout: 0
1100000111100111 1010111011101101 1 -> sum: 0111000011010101, cout: 1

1001110110111110 0010011001101001 0 -> sum: 1100010000100111, cout: 0
1001101100111111 0001001001011010 0 -> sum: 1010110110011001, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
